LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION TO FILE AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT SUBSTITUTING DEFENDANTS' TRUE NAME FOR FICTITIOUS NAME. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. DESOTO MAY FILE AN AMENDMENT SUBSTITUTING SANJAY SURI IN PLACE OF DOE 1 NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 8, 2017. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-01-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 61893757)

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION TO FILE AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT SUBSTITUTING DEFENDANTS' TRUE NAME FOR FICTITIOUS NAME

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. Desoto may file an amendment substituting Sanjay Suri in place of Doe 1 no later than December 8, 2017. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/HEK)
